description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard with green lawn areas in both the front and back. The exterior features a combination of white and natural wood paneling, giving it a contemporary appearance. The flat roof design is punctuated by several skylights and roof features, suggesting an emphasis on natural light. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large panes and smaller openings distributed across the facade. The main entryway is set back from the front lawn, accessible via a paved walkway, and is marked by a simple, flat-roofed porch. The property is enclosed by a light-colored fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary from the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and wood-paneled exterior, and fenced green yards in front and back. Asymmetrical windows and a simple entryway highlight its contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved walkway, and a mix of white and wood paneling with visible lawn and fence.
description_view_1: Side elevation displaying the house's length, flat roof, and the continuous fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backyard lawn, back facade, and additional windows and roof features.
description_view_3: Opposite side elevation with a clear view of the house's linear layout, flat roof, and fenced boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flat-roofed porch with a paved walkway, no steps, and minimal decorative elements.
